findings.title: Guide Labs debuts a new kind of interpretable LLM | TechCrunch

findings.title: Top 9 Large Language Models as of February 2026 | Shakudo
findings.description: Meta continues to be a leader in the LLM space with its state-of-the-art Llama models, prioritizing an open-source approach. The latest major release is Llama 4, which includes natively multimodal models like Llama 4 Scout and Llama 4 Maverick.
